content.message: 🎉 New: Real-time fleet tracking is now available —

content.title: Know where every vehicle is,
content.subtitle: Real-time GPS tracking, geo-fences, smart alerts, and AI-powered route optimisation — all in one dashboard.

content.title: Everything your fleet needs in one place
content.subtitle: From live tracking to driver behaviour — all the tools to run a smarter, safer fleet.

items.title: Real-time Tracking
items.description: Live GPS positions refreshed every 5 seconds with speed, heading, and engine status.

items.title: Smart Alerts
items.description: Geo-fence breaches, speeding, idle-time, and custom threshold notifications.

items.title: Analytics & Reports
items.description: Fuel consumption, route efficiency, and driver behaviour reports on demand.

items.title: Route Optimisation
items.description: AI-powered routes with live traffic and road condition awareness.

items.title: Remote Control
items.description: Engine cut-off and door lock/unlock from dashboard or mobile.

items.title: Mobile App
items.description: Android and iOS apps for drivers and managers on the go.

content.title: Up and running in minutes
content.subtitle: No complex integrations. Plug in, sign up, and start tracking.

items.title: Install the device
items.description: Plug our compact GPS tracker into your vehicle's OBD-II port — takes under 5 minutes.

items.title: Connect to the platform
items.description: The device auto-registers. Log in and see your fleet appear on the live map instantly.

items.title: Manage your fleet
items.description: Set geo-fences, configure alerts, invite team members, and pull reports — all from one screen.

items.name: Zara Khan
items.quote: We reduced fuel costs by 22% in the first three months. The geo-fence alerts alone paid for the subscription.

items.name: Ali Raza
items.quote: The dashboard is incredibly intuitive. Our drivers adopted the mobile app with zero training.

items.name: Sara Ahmed
items.quote: Real-time visibility transformed how we manage our government fleet. Accountability has never been higher.

content.title: Plans for every fleet size
content.subtitle: No hidden fees. Cancel anytime. All plans include a 14-day free trial.

items.question: How long does installation take?
items.answer: Most OBD-II trackers are plug-and-play and take under 5 minutes. Hardwired units take 20–40 minutes.

items.question: Is there a free trial?
items.answer: Yes — all plans include a 14-day free trial with no credit card required.

items.question: What countries are supported?
items.answer: Pakistan, UAE, Saudi Arabia, Kuwait, and Bahrain. More regions coming in 2025.

items.question: Do you offer an API?
items.answer: Yes — Professional and Enterprise plans include full REST API and webhook access.

content.title: Fleet insights, straight to your inbox
content.description: Monthly digest of best practices, product updates, and fleet management tips.
